# daytona_initialize_webhooks (Action)

Initializes webhooks for a Daytona organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_initialize_webhooks" "example" {
  config {
    organization_id = "organization-id"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to operate on. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
